title: 2026 Grammy Awards Record of the Year Predictions
text: Nominees: Bad Bunny – "Debí Tirar Más Fotos", Sabrina Carpenter – "Manchild", Doechii – "Anxiety", Billie Eilish – "Wildflower", Lady Gaga – "Abracadabra", Kendrick Lamar with SZA – "Luther", Chappell Roan – "The Subway", Rosé and Bruno Mars – "APT.". Key Expert Commentary: J.J. Italiano, Spotify's head of global music curation and discovery, emphasized the competitive field: "There were so many incredible records." He highlighted that the distinction between Song of the Year and Record of the Year remains "really cool" because it allows the industry to evaluate both songwriting craft and recording artistry annually. Regarding specific nominees, Italiano praised the Rosé and Bruno Mars collaboration as "one of the best-engineered and -arranged records I've heard in an extremely long time." He also commended Lady Gaga's "Abracadabra" for arriving "at exactly the right moment," and described Chappell Roan's "The Subway" as "extremely strong." Predictions: Should Win: Kendrick Lamar with SZA – "Luther". Will Win: Rosé and Bruno Mars – "APT.". The analysis notes that Bruno Mars' track record with Grammy collaborations—including 2022's Silk Sonic sweep and recent nominations—positions the duo favorably.
